name: John McCain
summary: War hero and U.S. Senator who criticized Trump, including after Trump's attack on his POW record, and cast the decisive vote against the 2017 Obamacare repeal.

keyStatements.quote: He's not a war hero. He was a war hero because he was captured. I like people who weren't captured.
keyStatements.context: Trump remark about McCain at the Family Leadership Summit

keyStatements.quote: We are not the president's subordinates. We are his equals.
keyStatements.context: Excerpt from McCain's memoir released after his death

keyStatements.quote: Our relationship has been one of fair and unfair criticism, me of Mr. Trump. But at some point, I thought the presidency would show more respect for the office than he does for himself.

timeline.significance: Tortured for 5.5 years as prisoner of war

timeline.event: Withdrew support for Trump after Access Hollywood tape
timeline.significance: Said he'd write in another candidate

timeline.event: Cast decisive vote against Obamacare repeal
timeline.significance: Thumbs down vote blocked Trump's priority

credibility.background: War hero, POW for 5.5 years in Vietnam, U.S. Senator for 31 years, 2008 Republican presidential nominee

oppositionReasons: Trump attacked McCain's military service and POW status
Said the president should respect the office and the Constitution
Warned Congress are not the president's subordinates
endorsement: Did not support Trump; requested Trump not attend his funeral

sources.title: Trump: McCain was not a war hero
McCain book excerpt: Learn how to respect the office of the presidency
